Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class BridgeDebugServer

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Lightweight WebSocket server that streams IBridgeTracer events to external tools (e.g., VS Code extension). Opt-in via BridgeDebugServerOptions.Enabled. Localhost-only.

public sealed class BridgeDebugServer : IBridgeTracer, IAsyncDisposable
Inheritance
object
BridgeDebugServer
Implements
IBridgeTracer
IAsyncDisposable

Constructors

BridgeDebugServer(int, IBridgeTracer?)

Creates a debug server listening on the specified port.

public BridgeDebugServer(int port = 9229, IBridgeTracer? inner = null)

Parameters

port int

Port to listen on (default 9229).

inner IBridgeTracer

Optional inner tracer to delegate events to.

A task that represents the asynchronous dispose operation.

Called when a JS→C# method invocation completes successfully.
